verses.text: Syria kumpipa' galkap a uk Naaman pen kumpipa' maipha a ngah ulianpi khat ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama hangin Syria mite gualzawhna pia hi. Amah a thahat a vanglian khat hi a, ahih hangin amah a phak ahi hi
Syria mite in a galsimna khat uhah Israel gam panin numeino khat ciahpih uh a, tuanu in Naaman' zi na' a sem hi
Amah in a tonu kiangah, “Samaria-ah a om kamsangpa tawh ka topa kimu thei leh! Amah in a phakna damsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Naaman in hih thu a zak ciangin sungtumin a topa kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Israel gam numeino in thu gen hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa in, “Tu-in pai in. Israel kumpipa kiangah lai khat ka khak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in ngun talen sawm, kham shekel tul guk,leh pawipuan sawm a keng hi
Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah laikhak keng a, tua sungah, “Hih laikhak na ngah ciangin, ama phakna na damsak theihna dingin ka nasempa Naaman nangma kiangah kong sawlna thu thei in,” a ci hi

Israel kumpipa in a laikhak a sim ciangin amah in a puante balkekin, “Mi khat a phaknatna damsak dingin hih mipa in kei tungah hih thu hong puakna dingin a that ding leh a nungtasak dingin kei, Pasian ka hi hiam? Ngaihsun dih un. Kei tawh kitotna ding a zon'na thei un,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Israel kumpipa in a puante a balkekna thu Pasian' mipa Elisha in a zak ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah mi sawlin, “Bang hangin na puante balkek na hi hiam? Israel sungah kamsang khat a omna thu amah in a theihna dingin tu-in kei kiangah amah hong paisak in,” cisak hi
Tua ahih ciangin a sakolte leh a leengte tawh Naaman hong pai-in Elisha' kongah a khawl hi
Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah kamtai khat sawlin, “Pai in la, Jordan gun sungah sagihvei va kisil in. Tua ciangin nangma cilesa a ngei hong bangkikin, nang na siang ding hi,” cisak hi

Ahih hangin Naaman hehin paikhia a, “En un, amah kei kiangah hong paikhia-in, ka gei-ah hong dingin, a Pasian a Topa' min loin, a natna mun tungah a khut vanin, kei miphakpa hong damsak taktak ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi
Israel tuite khempeuh sangin Damaskas gama om Abana leh Farpar gun tuite hoihzaw hilo ahi hiam? Tuate' sungah kisilin siang theilo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in paikhia hi

Ahih hangin a nasemte a nai-ah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Ka topa aw, kamsangpa in na lian khat a sem dingin hong sawl hi leh sem ding hilo na hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin amah in nang kiangah, ‘Kisil in la siang in,’ hong cih ciangin na hih ding bangzah ta-in kilawmzaw hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian mipa' kamgen bangin amah paisukin Jordan gun sungah sagihvei kidiah hi. Tua ciangin a cilesa naupangno cilesa bangin a ngei bangkikin amah a siang hi

Tua ciangin Pasian' mipa kiangah amah leh a pawlte khempeuh kileh kikin ama mai-ah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “En in, leitung mundang khempeuhah Pasian omloin, Israel sung bekah om hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na nasempa tung panin letsong khat hong sang in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “A na ka sep Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, bangmah kong sang kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a lakna ding kunh teitei a, ahih hangin amah in nial veve hi

Tua ciangin Naaman in, “Tua ahih leh kong thum hi, na nasempa tungah la-sakol nih puakkhop leitang hong pia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-a kipanin na nasempa in meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin pasian dangte khat peuhpeuh tungah pialoin Topa' tung bekah pia ding hi

Ahi zongin hih thu-ah Topa in na nasempa a mawhna hong maisak hen: Rimmon biakinn sungah a bia dingin ka topa a pai ciangin zui ding ka hih manin Rimmon biakinn sungah kei ka kunna thu-ah Topa in a nasempa hong maisak hen,” a ci hi
Amah in ama kiangah, “Nuamtakin pai in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin ama kiang panin Naaman tawmkhat a pai khit ciangin

Pasian' mipa Elisha' nasem Gehazi in, “Ama hong puak nate sangloin ka topa in Syria mi hih Naaman ciahsak mawk hi. Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, amah nungdelhin ama tung panin na khat peuhpeuh ka ngah ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gehazi in Naaman nungdelh hi. Tua ciangin ama nungah mi khat hong taina Naaman in a muh ciangin amah a dawn dingin a leeng panin kum a, “Thu a hoihkim hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “A vekpi-in hoih hi. Ka topa in, ‘Kamsangte nih Efraim mualtung gam panin kei kiangah tu mahmahin hong tung hi. Kong thum hi, amaute tungah ngun talen khat leh pawipuan nih pia in,’ a ci dingin hong sawl hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Naaman in, “Talen nih hong sang nuam hoh in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a san' ding kunh a, ngun talen nih ip nihin henin pawipuan nih tawh, a nasem nihte tungah a guan' hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Gehazi' mai-ah tuate pua uh hi
Tua ciangin mualtungah amah a tun' ciangin amah in amaute tung panin tuate la-in inn sungah koih hi. Tua ciangin a mite sawlkhia a, amaute kihem uh hi
Amah sungtumin a topa' mai-ah ding a, tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Gehazi aw, koi-ah pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasempa koimah pailo hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Nangmah a dawn dingin a leeng tung panin mipa a kihei laitakin nang tawh ka kha omkhawm hilo ahi hiam? Sum leh puante, oliv huante leh leenggui lote, tuute leh bawngtalte, nasem numeite leh nasem pasalte san' ding hun ahi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin nangma tung leh na suanlekhakte tungah Naaman' phakna hong belh tawntung ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama omna panin vuk bangin kangin a phakin a paikhia hi.
